title: Momonosuke Faces Wano’s Future
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Queen, Sanji, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: HANG IN THERE, ZORO, MY LAD!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...For turning your backs on the beast pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Where's Marco- San?! Please do something!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's already at his limit!! We're gonna have to fight for ourselves!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Crap! Fighting both of them together is kinda rough!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this keeps up, they'll exterminate the entire floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the treatment isn't working, take the moss-mummy and get out of here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We've already given him the shot...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it's taking longer than expect-ted to take effect!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's because his body is in really bad shape...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm right here, come get me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Find Ronoroa Zoro and finish him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: They're apparently trying some weird healing method!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't see clearly through all the dust they're making!!

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: I'm going to snuff out Vinsmoke Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you married pudding like you were supposed to, we wouldn't have had to join forces with these brutes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Protect zerojuro!! He was in- jured fight- ing for the cause!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Aaah!! Leave us be, whisper- snapper!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it! You're always such a pain in the ass, moss-head!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 50 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
